title: Auto Sprint Plus
description: Auto Sprint Plus makes sprinting easier without holding CTRL key. It also provides you with complete hands free movement control for travelling and exploration.
body:
# Auto Sprint Plus

> Automatic Sprint & Hands Free Movement for Minecraft

Auto Sprint Plus is a lightweight auto sprint mod for Minecraft that automatically keeps you sprinting while moving forward — no more holding `CTRL` or double tapping `W`.

The mod also includes directional auto walking, allowing hands-free movement in any direction for exploration, building, travel, and long gameplay sessions.

---

## Features

- Automatic sprint while moving forward
- No need to hold `CTRL`
- No more double tapping `W`
- Directional auto walking
- Client-side only
- Lightweight and fast
- Fully customizable keybinds
- Clean notification system
- Works on most multiplayer servers

---

## Perfect For

- Survival
- PvP
- Exploration
- Parkour
- Long-distance travel
- Building projects
- Accessibility & reduced hand strain

---

# Main Features

## Automatic Sprinting

Simply move forward and sprint automatically.

No more:
- Holding `CTRL`
- Double tapping `W`
- Constantly toggling sprint

---

## Directional Auto Walk

Move continuously in any direction without holding movement keys.

Useful for:
- Long travel sessions
- Straight-line building
- Cinematic recordings
- Relaxed gameplay

---

## Clean Interface

Toggle notifications on or off to keep your screen clean while playing or recording videos.

---

## Fully Customizable

All keybinds can be changed directly from Minecraft's standard controls menu.

---

# Default Controls

| Key | Action |
|---|---|
| `R` | Toggle Auto Sprint |
| `Up Arrow` | Auto walk forward |
| `Left Arrow` | Auto walk left |
| `Right Arrow` | Auto walk right |
| `Down Arrow` | Auto walk backward |
| `H` | Toggle notifications |

To stop auto walking:
- Press the same arrow key again
- Or manually press a movement key

---

# Installation

## Requirements

- Minecraft `1.21.x` or `26.1.x`
- Fabric Loader
- Fabric API

---

## Steps

1. Install Fabric Loader
2. Download Fabric API
3. Download Auto Sprint Plus
4. Place both files into your `mods` folder
5. Launch Minecraft and enjoy

---

# Why Use Auto Sprint Plus?

Minecraft includes toggle sprint, but Auto Sprint Plus provides a smoother and more seamless hands-free movement experience.

Ideal for:
- Massive biome exploration
- AFK movement
- Long gaming sessions
- Comfortable controls
- Reduced repetitive key pressing

---

# Technical Details

- Client-side only
- Works on vanilla multiplayer servers
- Lightweight with minimal resource usage
- No server installation required
- Safe and simple to use

---

# Accessibility

Auto Sprint Plus helps reduce repetitive hand movement and finger strain during extended gameplay sessions.

---

# Keywords

Auto Sprint Mod, Toggle Sprint, Minecraft Auto Sprint, Hands Free Movement, Auto Walk Mod, Fabric Sprint Mod, Client Side Utility Mod, Minecraft QoL Mod
